note: Prototype fallback. Direct roles were checked against public career/search pages; run the collector to refresh.

jobs.title: Data Analyst (all genders) — Supply Data Solutions
jobs.description: Gather, analyze and interpret data; translate complex data into actionable insights; automate reporting; build Looker dashboards; collaborate with data engineers, data scientists and business stakeholders. Requires 3+ years, strong SQL, BigQuery and visualization; Python is a plus.

jobs.title: Analytics Engineer — Supply Data Solutions
jobs.description: Own supply data and create reusable analytics marts. Build and monitor pipelines with Python and GCP; advanced SQL, BigQuery, CI/CD, IAM, data contracts and stakeholder alignment. dbt or Dagster and supply-chain experience are helpful.

jobs.title: Analytics Engineer — Shop Analytics
jobs.description: Advanced SQL, dbt, robust event-data models, frontend tracking, GA4, orchestration and cloud data platforms such as BigQuery. Work independently with cross-functional stakeholders and translate business requirements into technical solutions.

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist — Search Engine
jobs.description: Build and deploy machine-learning algorithms for personalized shopping. Python, SQL, large-scale data pipelines, cloud platforms and statistical model evaluation. Recommendation, retrieval, experimentation, BigQuery and CI/CD experience are useful.

jobs.title: Senior Business Analyst
jobs.description: Product and technology business analysis in e-commerce. Translate ambiguous business questions into structured requirements, metrics and recommendations; partner with product, technology and commercial stakeholders.

jobs.title: Senior Data Engineer — Finance Tech
jobs.description: Own a data platform built around Dagster, dbt, AWS ECS and BigQuery. Build ELT pipelines, critical reports, monitoring, tests, CI/CD and infrastructure with expert SQL and Python.

jobs.title: Staff Data Engineer — Sponsored Content & Products
jobs.description: Lead data-pipeline modernization and cross-functional information architecture. Own scalable data models, monitoring, reliability, engineering standards and technical trade-offs. Requires 7+ years of engineering experience.

jobs.title: Business Analyst Commercial
jobs.description: Commercial business analysis for an international travel-retail business. Expected focus on KPIs, stakeholder communication, structured analysis and actionable commercial recommendations.
jobs.discovery_source: Company search page; verify role availability

jobs.title: BI Data Scientist
jobs.description: Business-intelligence and data-science role in international travel retail. Expected work includes Python/SQL analytics, predictive modeling, dashboards and communicating insights to business stakeholders.
jobs.discovery_source: Company search page; verify role availability

jobs.title: (Junior) Data Analyst Campaigning (w/m/d)
jobs.work_mode: Mobile work offered; office share not stated
jobs.description: Campaign analytics role in Freenet's Data & AI area. Optimize campaign selection and performance, create campaign configurations, and collaborate with customer management and market research. The public posting lists mobile work as a benefit but does not state a fixed office split.

jobs.title: Data Engineer Datenplattform (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Build and maintain data products, architectures, pipelines and integration processes on EDEKA IT's Azure and Databricks data platform for customer, transaction and master data. The posting states three office days and two home-office days.

jobs.title: Global Category Merchandise Manager (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Analytics-heavy global merchandising role consolidating market data, analyzing performance, translating insights into recommendations, and building decision processes with Power BI. The posting states hybrid work with up to 60% remote per month.

jobs.title: HR Manager Data Analytics and Systems (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Own HR reporting with SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere, analyze employee-journey data, deliver stakeholder analyses, and improve HR information systems. SQL and at least two years of HR or data analytics experience are requested; hybrid work is offered.

jobs.title: ESG Data & AI Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Develop ESG dashboards and analyses, turn complex data into management decisions, and shape AI use cases and strategy with Tchibo's AI team. Requires 3–5 years in analytics, ESG reporting or business intelligence plus SQL, visualization tools and useful Python and BigQuery experience.

jobs.title: Werkstudent Data, Analytics & AI (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Support data models and AI applications on Tchibo's Big Data Analytics Platform and create visualizations with SAP Analytics Cloud, Looker Studio or Tableau. This is a working-student position and therefore a low seniority fit.

jobs.title: Business Analyst – Digitales Marketing (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Analyze digital marketing, app and loyalty opportunities, formulate hypotheses, and turn performance, e-commerce and commercial analytics data into decisions. SQL, Power BI, Python and several years in retail, tech or a start-up are requested. The role offers partial mobile work.

jobs.title: Werkstudent Change Management & Transformation | Data & AI (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Support change management and transformation in OTTO's Data & AI organization on the Hamburg campus. This is a working-student role and is retained as a low-seniority match while the OTTO source monitors for experienced analytics openings.

jobs.title: (Junior) Business Intelligence Developer – Data Warehouse (m/f/d)
jobs.description: Develop data marts and support HELM's Azure, Snowflake and Power BI analytics platform, including data quality, ETL and governance. The role requests SQL, data modelling and useful Python experience and is explicitly positioned as a junior opportunity.

jobs.title: Media Technology & Data Strategy Lead (all genders)
jobs.description: Own media technology, audience intelligence and data strategy for a global Beiersdorf agency team. The remit includes GA4, Adobe Analytics, measurement, attribution, incrementality testing and AI-enabled insight generation. The posting explicitly states hybrid work in Hamburg.

jobs.title: Senior Analytics Business Partner (m/w/d)
jobs.location: Hamburg or other German Publicis offices
jobs.description: Senior intelligence and analytics role supporting steering analyses of revenue and investment data within a central Publicis Media analytics team. The role is available in Hamburg and follows a hybrid model.
